hero.subtitle: If orders come through WhatsApp, bookings get missed, or staff keep asking what to do next, we build a simple system that fixes it.
hero.helper: Less manual work. Fewer missed orders. Clearer daily operations.

services.title: What We Build Instead
services.subtitle: We replace the messy manual process with clear systems your staff can actually use.
services.footer: Start with one system. Fix the biggest bottleneck first. Add the next piece only when you need it.

order_management.title: Order Management System
order_management.description: A simple system for taking orders, collecting the right details, and giving staff one clear place to manage them.

booking_system.title: Booking System
booking_system.description: A clean booking flow for salons, barbers, gyms, and studios so customers can book without endless back-and-forth.

whatsapp_automation.title: WhatsApp Ordering Automation
whatsapp_automation.description: Keep WhatsApp if you want, but make it structured with auto questions, confirmations, and fewer messy chats.

internal_tool.title: Simple Internal Tool
internal_tool.description: Lightweight staff tools for order status, booking boards, and daily operations without enterprise software.

problemJourney.title: If This Is Your Day, You Need A Better System
problemJourney.subtitle: Most small local businesses are not lazy. The process is just too manual.

manual_orders.title: Orders are handled manually
manual_orders.description: Someone has to read every message, ask follow-up questions, and rewrite details for the kitchen, counter, or team.

whatsapp_chaos.title: WhatsApp gets messy fast
whatsapp_chaos.description: One customer asks about prices, another changes an order, someone else sends a booking request, and everything mixes together.

missed_bookings.title: Bookings get missed or delayed
missed_bookings.description: Messages sit unread, appointments overlap, and customers wait too long for a reply.

staff_confusion.title: Staff keep asking what to do next
staff_confusion.description: Because there is no clear flow, your team depends on memory, screenshots, and verbal updates.

summary.title: Manual work slows the whole business down.
summary.description: You lose time, staff make more mistakes, and customers feel the delay. The fix is a clearer system, not more effort.

contact.title: Get a simple system for your business
contact.subtitle: Ready to fix the mess?
contact.message: Send us how you handle orders or bookings today. We will tell you the simplest system to fix it.

whatsapp.message: Hi Khaled, I want a simple system for my business. Right now we handle orders/bookings manually.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.guarantee: 100% money-back if we don't solve the problem we agreed to fix.

launchpad.outcome: Your messiest daily process now runs on a system, not memory.
features: One focused system (WhatsApp ordering, booking flow, or order intake)

growth_engine.title: Growth
growth_engine.description: Connect the pieces so your whole day runs through one place.
growth_engine.outcome: Orders, bookings, and staff tasks all live in one clean flow.

what_do_you_build.question: What exactly do you build?
what_do_you_build.answer: We build simple systems for orders, bookings, WhatsApp workflows, and basic internal operations. The goal is to replace manual steps and make the business easier to run.

who_is_this_for.question: Who is this for?
who_is_this_for.answer: Mainly small restaurants, cafes, takeaways, salons, barbers, and small gyms or studios that still rely on WhatsApp, notes, and manual follow-up.

do_i_need_to_change_whatsapp.question: Do I need to stop using WhatsApp?
do_i_need_to_change_whatsapp.answer: Not always. In many cases we keep WhatsApp as the front door but make it structured, so it stops being chaotic.

how_long_does_it_take.question: How long does it take?
how_long_does_it_take.answer: It depends on the system, but most first versions are much faster than custom software projects because we focus on one clear operational problem.

will_my_staff_need_training.question: Will my staff need training?
will_my_staff_need_training.answer: A little, but the system is built to be simple. If staff need too much explanation, the system is too complicated.

can_we_start_small.question: Can we start small?
can_we_start_small.answer: Yes. Most businesses should start with the one process that creates the most daily mess, then improve the next step later.

what_if_i_already_use_something.question: What if I already use a tool?
what_if_i_already_use_something.answer: That is fine. We can improve the current flow, connect missing pieces, or replace only the part that is slowing you down.

how_do_we_start.question: How do we start?
how_do_we_start.answer: Message us with how you currently take orders or bookings. We will review the process and tell you what should be fixed first.

ecommerce.question: Do you handle e-commerce functionality, such as payment processing and product management?
ecommerce.answer: Yes, we handle all aspects of e-commerce functionality, including payment processing, product management, order tracking, and more. We ensure that your online store is fully equipped to handle transactions smoothly and securely.

process.question: What is the process for starting a project with you?
process.answer: The process begins with a consultation to understand your needs and goals. After that, we provide a detailed proposal outlining the project scope, timeline, and cost. Once agreed, we begin the design and development phases, keeping you involved and updated throughout the process.

integrations.question: Can you integrate third-party services or APIs into my website?
integrations.answer: Absolutely, we can integrate various third-party services and APIs into your website to enhance its functionality. Whether it's a payment gateway, analytics tool, or any other service, we ensure seamless integration.

mobile_friendly.question: How do you ensure that my website is mobile-friendly and responsive?
mobile_friendly.answer: We follow responsive design principles and thoroughly test the website on different devices and screen sizes. This ensures that your website provides an optimal user experience on desktops, tablets, and smartphones.

description.part1: When you decide to build your website, whether it's a personal site or an online store, it's natural to question the chances of success. You might wonder how long it will take and what you need to achieve your goals.
description.part2: I understand these concerns, which is why I've crafted a detailed roadmap for both paths. This roadmap includes timelines, expectations, requirements, and everything you need to know before making the investment. Read it carefully, and if you're ready, let's connect.

form.title: Enter the email you want us to send the pdf to

alpha.quote: A cinematic concept site for a premium powerlifting and bodybuilding gym — monochrome, editorial, and built to make a serious brand feel like a place worth walking into.
alpha.name: EYB

streak.quote: One quiet app for the things you do every day — streaks, focus, todos, and ideas. Free forever, installable anywhere.
streak.name: EYB

jojooshop.quote: We built Jojooshop to show what a fully custom e-commerce experience can look like when design, multilingual support, authentication, admin tools, and modern web engineering are handled properly from the start.
jojooshop.name: EYB

chikrice.quote: This is the best app I could ask for. It is simple, minimal, and straight to the point. It saved me so much time and frustration — I just eat, log my food, and the app counts everything for me. Thank you EYB team for giving us an app like this for free.
chikrice.name: EYB

healthyplus.quote: The website made ordering much easier for my customers. They can now see the honey products, prices, cart total, and send the full order to me on WhatsApp without all the back-and-forth.
healthyplus.name: Mahmood Alamarzooqi

aiyifen.quote: We wanted to test online sales for our clothing business, and EYB helped us build the store, set up payments and delivery, and run the campaigns. Within three months, online became a real sales channel for us.
aiyifen.name: Peter

resume-maker.quote: Paste any job description and watch your resume rewrite itself — keyword-matched, ATS-ready, and exported as a clean PDF in seconds.
resume-maker.name: EYB

project_detail.cta_body: If you have the same kind of manual process problem, message us and we will tell you the simplest way to fix it.

workProcess.title: How It Works
workProcess.subtitle: Simple process. No long agency setup. No complicated discovery phase.

talk.title: Talk to us
talk.description: You show us how orders or bookings are handled today and where things keep breaking.

understand.title: We map the process
understand.description: We look at the current flow, find the manual bottlenecks, and decide what the system actually needs to do.

build.title: We build your system
build.description: We create the order flow, booking flow, WhatsApp automation, or internal tool based on that process.

use.title: Your team starts using it
use.description: You get a simpler day-to-day process, less confusion, and less manual follow-up.

brandChecker.title: Is your brand name available?
brandChecker.subtitle: Check domains and social handles in one go — see where your name is free before you commit.
brandChecker.helper: Enter your brand name or a full domain (e.g. eyb or eyb.com). If you enter a domain, we check that exact domain. If you enter a name, we check common domains and social usernames.
